disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A very high home blood-pressure reading (around 205/115) with a sudden, severe pounding, vice-like headache today
trigger_question_examples: What number is the blood-pressure machine showing?
Tell me about the headache — how bad and how sudden?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The machine says 205 over 115 and my head is pounding like it's in a vice — it came on suddenly today.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Acute, rapidly worsening weakness of both legs with inability to stand or bear weight
trigger_question_examples: Can you stand or walk at all?
When did the leg weakness start and how fast did it come on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My legs have turned to jelly — they got much weaker tonight and now I can't stand up or take any weight on them.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The weakness affects both legs equally, with no face droop, no slurred speech and no one-sided arm weakness
trigger_question_examples: Is it one side or both legs the same?
Any drooping of the face, trouble speaking, or weakness in an arm?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's both legs the same — evenly. My face is fine, my speech is fine, and my arms are only a bit weak, not one-sided.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Painful cramps and spasms in both calves
trigger_question_examples: Any cramps or spasms in the muscles?
What do the legs feel like apart from weak?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, my calves keep cramping and spasming — it's painful.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Several weeks of passing large amounts of urine and waking multiple times at night to urinate
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any change in how often you're passing urine?
Are you getting up at night to go to the toilet?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: For a few weeks now I've been passing a lot of urine and getting up several times a night to go.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Long-standing blood pressure that has been difficult to control despite three daily tablets, one of which is a fluid/water tablet
trigger_question_examples: What do you take for your blood pressure?
Has your blood pressure been easy or hard to control?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's always been hard to control — I'm on three tablets: amlodipine, perindopril and a water tablet called indapamide, and I take them every day.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Feeling generally weak, tired and crampy in the muscles for the past few weeks
trigger_question_examples: How have you been feeling in yourself over the last few weeks?
Any tiredness or muscle weakness building up before today?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've felt weak and tired and my muscles have been crampy for a few weeks, but tonight is far worse than ever.
